headline: Why Jefferies Thinks Xylem (XYL) Could Be Poised for a Catch-Up Rally
summary: With short percentage of shares outstanding at 3.44%, Xylem Inc. (NYSE:XYL) is among the 7 Best HVAC Stocks to Buy for AI Server Heat Mitigation. On June 25, Jefferies upgraded Xylem Inc. (NYSE:XYL) to Buy from Hold and raised its price target to $140 from $130. The firm noted that the stock has underperformed the broader industrial […]
